format.raw: CNB NetScreen deviceid=CNB Root:system-notification-00257(traffic) starttime="$DATE" duration=$DURATION policyid=$POLICY_ID service=$SERVICE proto=$PROTO src zone=V1-Untrust dst zone=V1-Trust action=$ACTION sent=0 rcvd=0 src=$SRC_IP dst=$DST_IP srcport=$SRC_PORT dstport=$DST_PORT sessionid=0

xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="Key&Value" arr_length="15">
    <Field position="0"  name="device_id" />
    <Field position="1"  name="policyid" />
    <Field position="2"  name="dstn_ip"       org_name="dst" />
    <Field position="3"  name="src_ip"        org_name="src" />
    <Field position="4"  name="session_id" />
    <Field position="5"  name="rcvd" />
    <Field position="6"  name="sent" />
    <Field position="7"  name="duration" />
    <Field position="8"  name="src_port" />
    <Field position="9"  name="start_time" />
    <Field position="10" name="zone" />
    <Field position="11" name="service" />
    <Field position="12" name="prtc"          org_name="proto" />
    <Field position="13" name="dstn_port"     org_name="dstport" />
    <Field position="14" name="action" />
    <Field position="15" name="logtype"       convert_tag="[[@set('traffic')]]" />
    <Field position="16" name="model"         convert_tag="[[@set('netscreen')]]" />
    <Field position="17" name="vendor"        convert_tag="[[@set('junipernetworks')]]" />
    <Field position="18" name="eqp_type"      convert_tag="[[@set('fw')]]" />
    <Field position="19" name="parser_version" convert_tag="[[@set('v1')]]" />
    <Field position="20" name="original_log"  convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
    <Field position="21" name="parser_info"   convert_tag="[[@set('[Juniper]_netscreen_traffic_v1_keyvalue')]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
